# Resume Surface Drift After Greenfield

This family captures greenfield repos where the restart surfaces or `/resume` guidance drifted away from canonical manifest plus workflow-state truth.

Archive origin:

- synthetic greenfield resume drift

What mattered:

- START-HERE.md, context-snapshot.md, and latest-handoff.md had to stay derived from canonical state
- `/resume` had to treat manifest plus workflow-state as first-class truth
- weaker models needed one legal next move instead of stale handoff text

Current protection:

- the restart surfaces are derived from canonical state
- `/resume` should trust manifest plus workflow-state first
- the fixture intentionally makes the derived surfaces stale so resume drift remains visible
